articles.title: Microsoft’s Secure Boot has been broken for a decade and no one noticed until now
articles.content: Old and forgotten "shims" Microsoft failed to revoke have made Secure Boot bypasses simple.
articles.titleZh: 微软的安全引导已经中断了十年，直到现在还没有人注意到
articles.contentZh: Microsoft未能撤销的旧的和被遗忘的“垫片”使得绕过安全启动变得简单。

articles.title: The US government warns that Russia state hackers are coming after your router
articles.content: With residential proxies all the rage, CISA urges router users to be vigilant.
articles.titleZh: 美国政府警告称，俄罗斯国家黑客正在追捕您的路由器
articles.contentZh: 由于住宅代理风靡一时， CISA敦促路由器用户保持警惕。

articles.title: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too
articles.content: "Context bombing" tricks hacking agents into shutting down before they can do harm.
articles.titleZh: 现在，捍卫者也在接受即时注射
articles.contentZh: “情境轰炸”伎俩让代理在造成伤害之前关闭。

articles.title: Patch for Windows Defender 0-day could allow attackers to fill hard disk
articles.content: The feud between NightmareEclipse and Microsoft shows no signs of resolving soon.
articles.titleZh: Windows Defender 0-day修补程序可能允许攻击者填充硬盘
articles.contentZh: NightmareEclipse和微软之间的争执没有很快解决的迹象。

articles.title: Google and Epic give up fighting — third-party Android app stores are coming next week
articles.content: Epic Games and Google have just jointly withdrawn their attempt to retroactively settle the lawsuit that's changing how Android app stores work in the United States - and that means Google will be forced to carry rival app stores inside of its own. In fact, Google tells the court, it's ready to begin carrying third-party […]
articles.titleZh: 谷歌和Epic放弃战斗—第三方Android应用商店将于下周推出
articles.contentZh: Epic Games和谷歌刚刚联合撤回了追溯和解该诉讼的尝试，该诉讼正在改变Android应用商店在美国的运作方式，这意味着谷歌将被迫在自己的内部运营竞争对手的应用商店。事实上，谷歌告诉法庭，它已经准备好开始携带第三方[…]

articles.title: Nothing’s good-looking Watch 3 Pro smartwatch is just $69
articles.content: While most fitness trackers are losing the screens to keep the price low, the CMF by Nothing Watch 3 Pro is a bit different. The budget-friendly smartwatch with a 1.43-inch OLED display is even cheaper than usual at Amazon, where it costs $69 in every color (the price fluctuates between $79 and $99). Some notable […]
articles.titleZh: 没有什么好看的Watch 3 Pro智能手表只需$ 69
articles.contentZh: 虽然大多数健身追踪器为了保持低价而失去了屏幕，但CMF by Nothing Watch 3 Pro有点不同。这款经济实惠的智能手表配备1.43英寸OLED显示屏，在亚马逊甚至比平时便宜，每种颜色的价格为69美元（价格在79美元至99美元之间波动）。一些值得注意的[…]
